Osaka, Japan Day 7

May 21, 2025

Location: Osaka, Japan

So firstly I went and climb the world shortest mountain, it was a pretty cute park all in all. I also went for the boat ride which I didn’t get to do previously because of poor weather.

The boat goes around the bay of Osaka and a lot of facotry stuff,also saw a giant ikea.

However the highlight is definetly the one night stay at the Wakayama Kada Onsen.
